message:
fix(fcp-aws/connector): correct self_check abstention message — SigV4 IS implemented (resolves br-xirgb)

Pre-fix, `self_check` at connector.rs:947 abstained against the
default AWS STS endpoint with the message "Self-check is not safe
against the default AWS STS endpoint because SigV4 signing is not
implemented". That reason was FALSE: SigV4 signing is fully
implemented in this connector via `fcp_sdk::sigv4::SigV4Signer` +
`client.rs::sign_request`. The integration test
`assert_sigv4_headers` (tests/integration.rs:137) confirms the
SigV4 headers actually go out on every request.

Investigation: this is a documentation/messaging defect, not a
missing implementation. The actual reason `self_check` declines on
the default STS endpoint is operational — `sts_get_caller_identity`
against `https://sts.amazonaws.com/` would hit *production* AWS
with the operator's real credentials, which is unsafe as a routine
self-check probe. Custom `sts_base_url` (LocalStack, signing proxy,
staging STS) lets the probe run deterministically against a
verification target without touching production.

Fix scope (analogous to br-3hrw3 sandbox stub correction —
correct an observable lie without re-implementing the underlying
machinery, which here is already correct):

  - Replace the abstention message with the real
    production-credentials-safety reason and keep the
    `sts_base_url` remedy pointer.
  - Pre-fix `RemediationHint` text at line 318 already said only
    "Set sts_base_url to a verification endpoint that validates
    SigV4 signatures" — no false claim there, no change needed.
  - The `aws_sigv4_supported: true` flag (line 181) and the
    `request_signing` doctor check at line 482 are accurate as-is.

Regression test:
  `self_check_message_does_not_falsely_claim_sigv4_unimplemented`
  pins three contracts: (1) the stale "SigV4 signing is not
  implemented" wording must not reappear, (2) the new message
  must explain the production-credentials safety reason, and
  (3) the message must continue to point operators at the
  `sts_base_url` remedy.

cargo test -p fcp-aws: 94 lib + 10 integration tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,6 +66,10 @@ criterion.workspace = true
 name = "cold_start"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "memory_overhead"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "local_invoke"
 harness = false
